infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to show accurate local weather for your farm.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We need camera access so you can attach a photo when adding a crop activity record.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We need photo library access so you can attach a photo when adding a crop activity record.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Naveena Uzhavan to access your photos to attach a picture to crop activity records.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Naveena Uzhavan to access your camera to capture a picture for crop activity records.
